languages.text: "Я желаю узнать, как ты справляешься с обязанностями губернатора".

traits.locale_text: "Я желаю узнать, как ты справляешься с обязанностями губернатора".

languages.text: "I wish to know how you are faring in your duties as governor."
languages.original_text: "Я желаю узнать, как ты справляешься с обязанностями губернатора".

traits.locale_text: "I wish to know how you are faring your duties as Governor."
"I wish to know how you are faring your duties as Governor."
"I wish to know how you are faring in your duties as governor."
"I wish to know how you are faring in your duties as governor."

languages.text: “我想了解一下你担任总督以来的工作进展。”
languages.original_text: "I wish to know how you are faring in your duties as governor."

traits.locale_text: “我想了解一下你担任总督以来的工作进展。”

languages.text: "Vali olarak vazifende nasıl bir performans gösterdiğini bilmek istiyorum."
languages.original_text: "I wish to know how you are faring in your duties as governor."

traits.locale_text: "Vali olarak vazifende nasıl bir performans gösterdiğini bilmek istiyorum."

languages.text: « Parlons de vos responsabilités de gouverneur. Tout se passe bien ? »
languages.original_text: "I wish to know how you are faring in your duties as governor."

traits.locale_text: « Parlons de vos responsabilités de gouverneur. Tout se passe bien ? »

languages.text: «Me gustaría saber qué tal desempeña sus funciones como gobernador».
languages.original_text: "I wish to know how you are faring in your duties as governor."

traits.locale_text: «Me gustaría saber qué tal desempeña sus funciones como gobernador».

languages.text: "Wie kommt Ihr mit Euren Pflichten als Gouverneur zurecht?"
languages.original_text: "I wish to know how you are faring in your duties as governor."

traits.locale_text: "Wie kommt Ihr mit Euren Pflichten als Gouverneur zurecht?"

languages.text: 「ご存じのとおり、私は、あなたが知事としてどのように務めているのかを知りたいのです。」
languages.original_text: "I wish to know how you are faring in your duties as governor."

traits.locale_text: 「ご存じのとおり、私は、あなたが知事としてどのように務めているのかを知りたいのです。」
